title: Create Account
description: Sign up for free in seconds. No credit card required to get started.

title: Verify Email
description: Confirm your email address to secure your account and access all features.

title: Complete Profile
description: Fill in your profile details to get personalized recommendations and services.

title: Set Preferences
description: Choose your preferences to get a tailored experience.

title: Add Payment Method
description: Securely add your preferred payment method for seamless transactions.

title: Enable Notifications
description: Stay updated by enabling notifications for important alerts and updates.
